title: Algerian Sea Bass Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic Algerian dish made with sea bass, preserved lemons, and olives.

ingredients.name: Algerian Spices (optional)
ingredients.notes: a blend of cumin, coriander, and cinnamon

instructions: Heat the oil in a large clay or ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped preserved lemons and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the green olives and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cumin, paprika, and Algerian spices (if using) and cook for 1 minute.
Season the sea bass with salt and black pepper, then add to the tagine.
Cover the tagine and cook for 8-10 minutes, until the fish is cooked through.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve hot.
Serve over couscous or rice, if desired.
